productDisplayName: Lotto Men Brown Fella Tres Shoes
description: Style Note Designed for runners who never compromise on style and comfort, this running shoe from lotto comes with a durable synthetic upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you safe and stable on various surfaces. Product Details Brown shoes, synthetic upper with strategically placed overlays for an enhanced shoe structure, lacing system for a snug Fit, cushioned footbed for shock absorption, branding on the sides, at the back of the collar and on the tongue, durable rubber outsole with grooves on the outsole for an added grip Material and Care Synthetic, rubber outsole Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
